description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with a bald head and a neutral facial expression. The figure is depicted in a T-pose, with both arms extended horizontally and legs straight. The upper body, including the torso and arms, is unclothed, revealing a smooth, simplified anatomical form. The lower body is covered with tight-fitting pants that extend to the ankles, and the feet are clad in shoes. The overall proportions are realistic, with defined musculature and a natural stance. The surface finish is matte, and the color palette is minimal, emphasizing the distinction between skin, clothing, and footwear.
description: A stylized adult human figure in a T-pose, wearing tight pants and shoes, with a bald head and unclothed upper body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, arms extended, and the front of the pants and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, chest, arm, and the side seam of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, arms, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head, chest, arm, and the side seam of the pants and shoes.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
